\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_state_reg:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_state\_reg: Clocked state register.
Captures next\_state on each rising edge of clk.
Synchronous reset drives state back to OFF\_STATE.

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-89a17e2b-54a6-4eac-8b08-614f5213776a}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_state_reg:source}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{process}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{rising\PYGZus{}edge}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{rst}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}1\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{OFF\PYGZus{}STATE}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{else}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{process}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nc}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}\PYG{p}{;}

\paragraph{p\_next\_state}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_next_state:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_next\_state: Combinational next\sphinxhyphen{}state logic.
FSM only advances when both en and timer\_exp are asserted.
If en is deasserted the state holds regardless of timer\_exp.
Transitions:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
OFF\_STATE  + en + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} ON\_STATE
ON\_STATE   + en + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} FADE\_STATE
FADE\_STATE + en + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} OFF\_STATE
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-be4eb36d-6343-441f-86ad-63ff29e94880}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_next_state:source}}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{en}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}1\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{and}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{timer\PYGZus{}exp}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}1\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{case}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{is}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{k}{when}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{OFF\PYGZus{}STATE}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{o}{\PYGZgt{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{ON\PYGZus{}STATE}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{k}{when}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{ON\PYGZus{}STATE}\PYG{+w}{   }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{o}{\PYGZgt{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{FADE\PYGZus{}STATE}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{case}\PYG{p}{;}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_outputs:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_outputs: Combinational Moore output decode.
Drives LED outputs based solely on current state.
All outputs default to 0 before the case statement to
prevent latches during synthesis.
Output truth table:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
OFF\_STATE  \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} led\_on=0 led\_fade=0 led\_off=1
ON\_STATE   \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} led\_on=1 led\_fade=0 led\_off=0
FADE\_STATE \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} led\_on=0 led\_fade=1 led\_off=0
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-9fd849bc-a809-4407-8aab-c7c0b8e6ec3e}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_outputs:source}}

\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{led\PYGZus{}on}\PYG{+w}{   }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}0\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{led\PYGZus{}fade}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}0\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{led\PYGZus{}off}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}0\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{case}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{is}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{when}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{OFF\PYGZus{}STATE}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{o}{\PYGZgt{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{led\PYGZus{}off}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}1\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{when}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{ON\PYGZus{}STATE}\PYG{+w}{   }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{o}{\PYGZgt{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{led\PYGZus{}on}\PYG{+w}{   }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}1\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{case}\PYG{p}{;}

\paragraph{Annotated Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/entity:annotated-source}}\sphinxSetupCaptionForVerbatim{src/pwm\_controller.sv}
\def\sphinxLiteralBlockLabel{\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/entity:id1}}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\},numbers=left,firstnumber=1,stepnumber=1]
\PYG{c+c1}{// PWM controller module.}
\PYG{c+c1}{//}
\PYG{c+c1}{// Generates a variable duty\PYGZhy{}cycle PWM signal using a 3\PYGZhy{}state FSM:}
\PYG{c+c1}{// IDLE \PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{} COUNTING \PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{} DONE. The duty cycle is set via the duty\PYGZus{}i port.}
\PYG{c+c1}{// The period is fixed at 256 clock cycles.}
\PYG{k}{module}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{pwm\PYGZus{}controller}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{\PYGZsh{}}\PYG{p}{(}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{parameter}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kt}{int}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{WIDTH}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mi}{8}
\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{(}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// System clock, rising\PYGZhy{}edge triggered.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{input}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{k+kt}{logic}\PYG{+w}{              }\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// Synchronous active\PYGZhy{}high reset.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{input}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{k+kt}{logic}\PYG{+w}{              }\PYG{n}{rst}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// Enable signal. FSM runs when asserted.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{input}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{k+kt}{logic}\PYG{+w}{              }\PYG{n}{en}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// Duty cycle: 0=0\PYGZpc{}, 255=100\PYGZpc{}.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{input}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{k+kt}{logic}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{WIDTH}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{l+m+mi}{0}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n}{duty\PYGZus{}i}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// PWM output signal.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{output}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kt}{logic}\PYG{+w}{              }\PYG{n}{pwm\PYGZus{}o}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// Active high when one full PWM period has completed.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{output}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kt}{logic}\PYG{+w}{              }\PYG{n}{period\PYGZus{}done}
\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// FSM state encoding}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{typedef}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{enum}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kt}{logic}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{l+m+mi}{0}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{c+c1}{// Waiting for enable.}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n}{IDLE}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{c+c1}{// Counting through the PWM period.}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n}{COUNTING}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{c+c1}{// Period complete, pulse period\PYGZus{}done for one cycle.}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n}{DONE}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{t\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{t\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{p}{,}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// Period counter register.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k+kt}{logic}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{WIDTH}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{l+m+mi}{0}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg: Clocked state and counter register.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// Captures next\PYGZus{}state on each rising edge of clk.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// Synchronous reset drives state to IDLE and clears counter.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// Counter increments each cycle in COUNTING state.}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{// // wavedrom::}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//    \PYGZob{} \PYGZdq{}signal\PYGZdq{}: [}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//      \PYGZob{} \PYGZdq{}name\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}clk\PYGZdq{},   \PYGZdq{}wave\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}P.......\PYGZdq{} \PYGZcb{},}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//      \PYGZob{} \PYGZdq{}name\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}rst\PYGZdq{},   \PYGZdq{}wave\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}1.0.....\PYGZdq{} \PYGZcb{},}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//      \PYGZob{} \PYGZdq{}name\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}en\PYGZdq{},    \PYGZdq{}wave\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}0.......\PYGZdq{} \PYGZcb{},}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//      \PYGZob{} \PYGZdq{}name\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}state\PYGZdq{}, \PYGZdq{}wave\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}=.=.....\PYGZdq{}, \PYGZdq{}data\PYGZdq{}: [\PYGZdq{}(any)\PYGZdq{},\PYGZdq{}IDLE\PYGZdq{}] \PYGZcb{},}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//      \PYGZob{} \PYGZdq{}name\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}pwm\PYGZus{}o\PYGZdq{}, \PYGZdq{}wave\PYGZdq{}: \PYGZdq{}x.0.....\PYGZdq{} \PYGZcb{}}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{c+c1}{//    ]\PYGZcb{}}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{always\PYGZus{}ff}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{@}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{k}{posedge}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{rst}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_state_reg:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_state\_reg: Clocked state and counter register.
Captures next\_state on each rising edge of clk.
Synchronous reset drives state to IDLE and clears counter.
Counter increments each cycle in COUNTING state.

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-1e85fcec-b141-4cc0-8d30-dfea0fafd253}.pdf}

\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{IDLE}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{else}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{COUNTING}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{+}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mb}{1\PYGZsq{}b1}\PYG{p}{;}

\paragraph{p\_next\_state}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_next_state:p-next-state}}\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_next_state::doc}}
\begin{DUlineblock}{0em}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_next_state:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_next\_state: Combinational next\sphinxhyphen{}state logic.
FSM advances only when en is asserted.
COUNTING state runs for a full 256\sphinxhyphen{}cycle period then moves to DONE.
Transitions:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
IDLE     + en           \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} COUNTING
COUNTING + count==255   \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} DONE
DONE                    \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} IDLE
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-d4dbc03d-fb26-46b1-9494-be9aec22744a}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_next_state:source}}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{p}{;}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_outputs:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_outputs: Combinational Moore output decode.
PWM output is high when counter is below duty\_i threshold.
period\_done pulses for exactly one cycle when state is DONE.
Output truth table:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
IDLE     \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} pwm\_o=0 period\_done=0
COUNTING \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} pwm\_o=(count \textless{} duty\_i) period\_done=0
DONE     \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} pwm\_o=0 period\_done=1
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-d27585de-a9ed-4836-adf9-7e6a890db30b}.pdf}

\paragraph{p\_state\_reg}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_state_reg:p-state-reg}}\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_state_reg::doc}}
\begin{DUlineblock}{0em}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source file:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{traffic\_light.vhd}}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source line:} 65
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Block type:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{process}}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Sensitivity list:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{clk}}
\end{DUlineblock}


\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_state_reg:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_state\_reg: Clocked state register.
Captures next\_state on each rising edge of clk.
When rst is asserted the state returns to RED synchronously,
regardless of timer\_exp or next\_state.

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-4385cb86-f4e5-4533-b212-2d38b5b3d2a8}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_state_reg:source}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{process}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{rising\PYGZus{}edge}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{rst}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}1\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{RED}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{else}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{process}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nc}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}\PYG{p}{;}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\paragraph{p\_next\_state}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_next_state:p-next-state}}\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_next_state::doc}}
\begin{DUlineblock}{0em}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source file:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{traffic\_light.vhd}}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source line:} 99
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Block type:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{process}}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Sensitivity list:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{state}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{timer\_exp}}
\end{DUlineblock}


\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_next_state:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_next\_state: Combinational next\sphinxhyphen{}state logic.
Evaluates the FSM transition function. Default assignment
next\_state \textless{}= state implements hold when timer\_exp is low.
All four transitions are guarded solely by timer\_exp = 1.
Transitions:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
RED       + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} RED\_AMBER
RED\_AMBER + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} GREEN
GREEN     + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} AMBER
AMBER     + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} RED
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-d65ad3af-d499-4fb9-945b-45902df0e341}.pdf}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_outputs:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_outputs: Combinational Moore output decode.
Drives lamp outputs based solely on current state.
All outputs default to 0 before the case statement to
prevent latches during synthesis.
Output truth table:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
RED       \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} red=1 amber=0 green=0
RED\_AMBER \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} red=1 amber=1 green=0
GREEN     \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} red=0 amber=0 green=1
AMBER     \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} red=0 amber=1 green=0
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-a933854f-b299-4d4c-a4c4-4e921d607cdb}.pdf}
